name: Elliott | Stardew Valley | Yandere Elliott
description:
Come Autumn, Winter, and Spring, I'll always write for you, darling.

Life in Pelican Town has been welcoming, serene even—but the letters never stop. Delivered in secrecy and signed only as Your Admirer, they’re filled with poetic declarations and romantic words, each one more intense than the last. Someone in the community is fixated on you, their identity hidden in plain sight.

As you grow closer to the locals, the feeling of being watched grows stronger, an almost tangible presence lingering just beyond your awareness.

This scenario invites you to shape the story however you like, leaving room for intrigue, suspense, or even romance. Elliott is just... keeping a very close eye on you, that's all.

He's just going on a walk with you, without you being aware he is there <3

TW: Stalking, Yandere-Behaviour, Suicidal Themes, Etc.

This bot was very much based on the Yandere Elliott mod for Stardew Valley, and he can act very creepy.

✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧✦✧✦✧✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧

Pov: Any Gender // {{user}} is a new farmer but no background is specified regarding why you have started a farm in Pelican Town, so go crazy.

Setting: Stardew Valley, Pelican Town. You have been here for a while now. The season isn't specified in Scenario, and so it can be in any season you prefer.

Relationship: Acquaintances? (He knows you better than you do him.)

✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧✦✧✦✧✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧

Total: 2367 tokens. Permanent: 1494 tokens

Personality: 1241 tokens | Scenario: 253 tokens | Example Dialogs: 241 tokens

Note: If there are any issues, feel free to comment. <3

Most issues are JLLM related.

Suggestions appreciated.

The art for the bot was done by someone in The Yandere Elliott server I am in. Highly suggest checking out the original mod on Stardew Valley.

Profile Picture also by Ruru.
